name: filename
description: Original filename of the uploaded document

name: gcs_path
description: Full GCS URI (gs://bucket/object) of the uploaded file

name: file_size_bytes
description: Size of the uploaded file in bytes

name: upload_timestamp
description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded to GCS (from GCS event metadata)

name: word_count
description: Estimated word count (decoded as UTF-8; falls back to 0 for binary files)

name: page_count
description: Estimated page count derived from file size heuristic

name: tags
description: Auto-generated tags derived from filename tokens

name: confidence_score
description: Simulated OCR confidence score in range [0.70, 1.00]

name: processed_at
description: Timestamp when the Cloud Run processor handled this document
